name: Shanghai Guijiu Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Guijiu Co.,Ltd. focuses on providing integrated financial information services primarily in China. The company operates through Financial Technology, Financial Leasing, Industrial Investment, and Bulk Trade segments. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Yanshi Enterprise Development Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Guijiu Co.,Ltd. in December 2019. Shanghai Guijiu Co.,Ltd. is based in Shanghai, China.
